pr.title: Non-record: Technique Taxonomy — Tier List, Interaction Effects, and BPB Verification Tools

output.summary: Synthesis of merged submissions into a BPB-tiered technique list, interaction matrix, and verification/budget tools for the Non-record 16MB track.
techniques: Tiered BPB delta taxonomy across merged PRs
Interaction-effects matrix clarifying training vs eval stacking
Verification checklist plus n-gram legality and parameter-budget tools
